name: databricks
description: Databricks Command Line Interface for managing workspace assets, jobs, and configs.

installs.notes: Downloads setup-cli installer. Requires run_shell using sudo or elevated execution to place binary in system path.

commonFailures: Installed but not configured — needs `databricks configure` to set up token, host, and workspace profiles.
Older legacy Python-based `databricks-cli` (v0.18 or below) conflicts with the new Go-based `databricks` CLI (v0.200+). Ensure the legacy pip package is uninstalled if upgrading.
